refactor(devcontainer): remove unnecessary auth workarounds

Remove settings that were ineffective for auth persistence:
- --hostname devcontainer (not needed with Docker volume)
- .claude.json creation (Docker volume persists it)
- /etc/machine-id generation (not needed with Docker volume)

Refs #8

commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): generate project-specific machine-id

Generate /etc/machine-id from project folder name hash to maintain
consistent container identity across rebuilds while ensuring different
projects have different IDs.

Format: md5sum of "devcontainer-${localWorkspaceFolderBasename}"

Refs #8

commit.message:
fix(devcontainer): create .claude.json to prevent auth re-confirmation

Add creation of ~/.claude/.claude.json in postCreateCommand.
Without this file, Claude Code treats the environment as a new
installation and requests re-authentication on every container rebuild.

Refs #8

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
feat(workflow): add multi-agent spec review and enhance code review

- Add /review-spec skill with 4 parallel agents:
  - Feasibility review (resource estimation, alternative comparison)
  - Quality review (state diagram, logging strategy)
  - Design review (file structure planning)
  - Fallback planning checker (whitelist creation)

- Enhance /review skill from 3 to 6 parallel agents:
  - Add fallback checker (whitelist validation)
  - Add spec compliance checker
  - Add logic verification checker (loop/branch validation)
  - Add file size check to architecture review
  - Enhance test review (coverage, potential bug detection)

- Update /start-task to include /review-spec in workflow
- Update /finish-task to update spec status on completion
- Add .claude/spec/issues/ directory for spec file storage

commit.message:
feat: add post-training quantization support (#15)

* feat: add post-training quantization support

Add quantize_model() and dequantize_model() wrapping MLX's native
affine quantization. Supports 4-bit and 8-bit weight quantization,
converting nn.Linear to nn.QuantizedLinear in-place. Integrates
with load_from_hf() via optional quantize parameter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use mx.dequantize for manual weight reconstruction

QuantizedLinear/QuantizedEmbedding don't have to_linear()/to_embedding()
methods. Manually reconstruct float layers using mx.dequantize.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Move stats aggregation to server-side SQL function

The stats handler was fetching all rows client-side, which hit
Supabase's default 1000-row PostgREST limit and returned inaccurate
counts. A new stats_summary() SQL function aggregates totals, types,
topics, and people entirely in Postgres.

abstraction, upload API route, and fileBuffer pass-through from DropZone.

Add verified legislation citations to all issue cite-blocks

All bills verified from congress.gov, 119th Congress (2025-2026):
- Issue 1: H.R. 3229 / S. 981 — Foreign Agents Transparency Act
- Issue 3: S. 3050 — PAID OFF Act (corporate tax reform)
- Issue 4: H.R. 3069 / S. 1506 — Medicare for All Act (Jayapal/Sanders)
- Issue 6: H.R. 4418 — Child Care for Working Families Act
- Issue 7: S. 1832 / H.R. 3543 — College for All Act (Sanders)
- Issue 8: S. 2823 / H.R. 5390 — FAMILY Act (Gillibrand/DeLauro)
- Issue 10: S. 788 — HOPE for Homeownership Act (anti-private equity)
- Issue 11: S. 1332 / H.R. 2743 — Raise the Wage Act ($17/hr)
- Issue 12: S. 1531 / H.R. 3115 — Assault Weapons Ban of 2025
- Issue 14: H.R. 7123 — Abolish ICE Act
- Issue 15: H.R. 3612 — End For-Profit Prisons Act
- Fixed minimum wage from $20 to $17 per Cortney's direction and actual bill

fix: Trade Desk shows locked banner when feature-gated + clarify Council Review requires input

- TradeDesk now detects FEATURE_LOCKED errors from paperState IPC and
  shows a visible upgrade banner instead of silently failing
- Council Review button requires non-zero Entry, Stop, and Target prices
  (this was the cause of the grayed-out button — not a tier gate)

Hide split-all button for non-host users

Only the host should see the batch "Split all N-way" action.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add cross-query consistency tests to catch contradictory agent responses

Tests verify that different query paths (direct priors query vs all-data
query, whereabouts listing vs city search, etc.) return consistent answers
for the same target. Catches bugs like the system denying a target has
priors then revealing them when asked for all historical data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: optimistic delete for backtest history items

Remove items from local state immediately after successful delete
instead of re-fetching, avoiding race conditions.

during the plugin rename. All now correctly reference dev-pipeline-frontend:.

  implementations (other project's handler depended on concrete type)

Use tmux client count to decide whether to kill session on tab close (#6)

- Replace isAttachOnly flag with tmux list-clients check
- After teardown, count remaining clients on the tmux session
- Kill session only when no other clients are attached (client count = 0)
- Leave session alive if other terminals are still connected
- Works uniformly for local, remote new, and remote attach sessions
- Add TmuxManager.clientCount() method using tmux list-clients
- Remove Session.isAttachOnly property (no longer needed)

commit.message:
Add runtime assertions for neurosymbolic agent behavior validation

Declarative behavioral invariants that are checked at runtime against
agent responses. Supports 8 condition types: token limits, pattern
matching/exclusion, tool call limits, cost caps, forbidden tools,
required keywords. Each assertion has a configurable fail action
(warn, violate, block, or request human review).

- New assertions module with check_assertions() engine
- JSON-based assertion file parser for per-agent config
- API: POST /api/assertions/check
- 11 new tests (2133 total), zero clippy warnings

feat: run all auditors for every plan — score now reflects true security posture

Previously, premium auditors (subdomains, vuln versions, breaches, typosquatting,
CT, DAST) only ran for paid plans, giving free/anonymous users a misleadingly
high score (92% vs 67% for the same domain).

redacted in main.py for free/anonymous users (category, severity, and penalty
preserved for accurate scoring; title/detail/recommendation cleared). Frontend
shows blurred locked cards with upgrade CTA for premium findings.

commit.message:
fix(security): prevent auto-backup from ghosting reset encryption

clearCachedPhrase() now also cancels pending auto-backup timers.
Reset handler clears cached phrase FIRST to prevent scheduleAutoBackup
from silently re-uploading a backup encrypted with the old phrase.
Also persists signed prekey to localStorage during reset.

feat: add Gated DeltaNet and Qwen 3.5 hybrid architecture (#9)

* feat: add Gated DeltaNet and Qwen 3.5 hybrid architecture

Implements Gated Delta Network (Yang et al., ICLR 2025) — linear
attention with error-correcting delta rule, learned decay and
update gates, and optional short causal convolutions.

Key features:
- Delta rule: state matrix S predicts v from k, corrects on error
- Decay gate (alpha): learned selective forgetting
- Update gate (beta): learned correction strength
- Fixed-size state: O(d^2) per token, no KV cache growth
- Qwen 3.5 config: hybrid 3:1 DeltaNet:GQA interleaved pattern
- NoPosition encoding for layers using convolutions instead of RoPE

This uses the recurrent form (sequential over tokens). Production
implementations use chunkwise parallelism for training efficiency.

Add all 156 GI-registered crafts from the GI Compendium PDF

  Channapatna Toys, Warli Painting, Kondapalli Toys, and more

commit.message:
feat: improved UI – guide profiles, AI search, toast notifications, dashboard

- New guide profile page /guides/[id] with bookings, revenue and calendar section
- AI-powered natural language search for guides (city, tour, name, priority)
- Global toast notification system (success/error/info/warning, auto-dismiss 4s)
- Improved home page: hero, live KPIs, feature grid, tours by city
- Improved dashboard: month/year selector, bar chart trend, colored KPIs, top guide banner
- Removed AI Agent Chat from nav
- API route /api/guides/[id] with upcoming bookings and revenue stats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(viz): implement document relationship visuals - shared components, API, code page, and PCF

Phase 1 - Shared Library:
- RelationshipCountCard component (100% test coverage)
- useForceSimulation hook with sync d3-force pre-computation (98.6% coverage)
- Barrel and deep import exports verified

Phase 2 - BFF API:
- Add countOnly parameter to visualization endpoint for fast count path
- 8 unit tests for countOnly behavior

Phase 3 - Code Page Enhancements:
- Migrate DocumentGraph to shared useForceSimulation (no more layout spinner)
- CSV export service with UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility
- Quick search filter for grid view

Phase 4 - RelatedDocumentCount PCF:
- Full PCF scaffold with platform libraries (React 16, Fluent v9)
- API hook with race condition handling and auth
- FindSimilarDialog integration for drill-through
- 30 unit tests (95%+ coverage)
- Solution ZIP for Dataverse deployment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Improve numeric inputs on review screen

- Switch from type="number" to type="text" with inputMode="decimal" for
  mobile numeric keypad without spinner arrows
- Only allow digits and one decimal point, max 2 decimal places
- Auto-format to 2 decimal places on blur
- Select all text on focus for easy overwriting
